englishDefinitions: A humorous or fictional name for a person who is very skeptical.
Used jokingly to describe someone who questions or doubts things a lot.
persianTranslation: نام طنزآمیز برای فرد بسیار بدبین/شکاک
examples: Everyone called him Dr Skeptismo because he doubted every idea.
Dr Skeptismo wasn't convinced by the explanation.
The nickname Dr Skeptismo was meant as a joke.
